audience_policies.source_phrase: Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 4 people at $2 per person. Children under age 2 are always free. Additional instructions: -Valid during normal hours of operation at any Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. -This is a single-use pass

coupon.source_phrase_block: Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 4 people at $2 per person. Children under age 2 are always free. Additional instructions: -Valid during normal hours of operation at any Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. -This is a single-use pass and does not need to be returned to the library.
